name: Springtime Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and scrape the potatoes.
2. Cook in boiling, salted water until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes.
4. Combine cucumber, chopped green onion, chopped green pepper, sliced radishes, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
5. Heat the mixture lightly, ensuring it does not boil.
6. Pour the sour cream mixture over the hot potatoes.
